name: Sweet Short Biscuits for Shortbread
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 cups All Purpose flour (more if needed)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together flour, salt, and soda with sugar in a medium mixing bowl.
2. Mix shortening into the dry ingredients using the tips of your fingers.
3. Gradually add buttermilk and gently knead until the dough forms a semi-stiff ball. Add more flour if needed to achieve this consistency.
4. Transfer dough onto a well-floured work surface. Knead just until smooth and firm enough to handle.
5. Roll or pat (preferred) the dough into a rectangle that is 1/2 inch thick.
6. Cut with floured cutter, knife, or rim of drinking glass.
7. Place biscuits on a greased cookie sheet.
8. Bake in a preheated oven at 400°F for 10 to 15 minutes, or until brown.
Yield: 8 large or 12 small biscuits.
